generated_oml:
instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor within the styrofoam container"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor1Data
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor within the styrofoam container"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor2Data
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempSensorData
]

instance InternalTempSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensor
]

instance InternalTempSensor1DataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature readings from internal sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor1Data
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance InternalTempSensor2DataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature readings from internal sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor2Data
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ExternalTempSensorDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw ambient temperature readings from external sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance TwoParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical thermal simulation model with two free parameters for incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance FourParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical thermal simulation model with four free parameters for heatbed thermal inertia prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for updating thermal model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulating temperature dynamics under varying operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for identifying sensor or actuator failures"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimizing heatbed and fan control to maintain target temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time thermal condition monitoring through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of thermal conditions using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations of temperature dynamics under varying operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for identifying sensor or actuator failures"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, HumanInterventionAction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heatbed and fan control to maintain target temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedAction, AdjustFanAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating thermal models using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParametersUpdatedInsight
]

instance SafetyComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates whether current thermal conditions comply with safety regulations"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assesses operational efficiency of the incubator system"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating detected sensor or actuator failure"
]

instance ModelParametersUpdatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful calibration of thermal model parameters"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power to maintain target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of fan speed for air circulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual intervention by maintenance personnel upon safety violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary thermal actuator controlling heating in the incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation actuator for temperature uniformity"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit managing actuation and data acquisition for the incubator system"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical incubator system for precise temperature regulation within a styrofoam-insulated container"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan are sent by the Raspberry Pi controller to regulate temperature; however, command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update cyber-physical system models with sensor-derived parameter estimates, which inform monitoring components for safety and optimality checks, with human or algorithmic decision-making for physical twin modifications when violations are detected, as depicted in Figure 1 of Document 1."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of simulation predictions against physical data, with the four-parameter thermal model demonstrating superior accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia. Calibration algorithms continuously adjust model parameters using sensor data to minimize discrepancies and ensure alignment with the physical twin."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on Raspberry Pi single-board computer; computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, deployment models, and availability/reliability assurances are not detailed in the provided documents."
]
